Here’s your chance to own two distinctive homes on one incredible property. Sitting on 1.12 private acres overlooking the Alliance Country Club golf course. This all-brick Tudor, built in 1929, blends historic charm with modern updates, featuring 4 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, original woodwork, arched Palladian windows, and decorative stone accents. A new steep-pitched roof (2023–2024) with a 75-year synthetic slate warranty reflects recent investment and lasting quality. Inside, enjoy a welcoming foyer, spacious living room with wood-burning fireplace, bright library, chef’s kitchen with eat-in area, and formal dining room. Upstairs, the primary suite offers its own fireplace, dual closets, and private bath, with three additional bedrooms and an updated hall bath. A partially finished attic with high ceilings adds potential bonus space. Adding incredible value is a separate 2-bedroom guest house with its own kitchen, bath, laundry, and living area — ideal for extended family, long-term guests, or rental income. Outside, relax or entertain on the oversized deck with peaceful backyard views. The property also includes a full basement with generous storage, a 2-car attached garage, and a covered 2-car carport. All this in a prime location just minutes from Silver Park, Mount Union, and local shops — an exceptional combination of classic character and functional living.

mismatches.Public_Remarks: This is one of those homes that just feels solid the second you pull up and step onto the front porch. Wide, covered, and actually usable - not just for looks. Inside, the woodwork is the real story. Original trim, built-ins, and hardwood floors that haven’t been stripped of their character. The layout flows the way these homes were meant to - defined spaces but still open enough to feel connected. Some homes just feel right - this is one you’ll want to see for yourself. The living, dining and flex areas are generous and comfortable, not chopped up, and the kitchen is clean, functional, and ready to use as-is or update over time depending on your plans. Upstairs gives you additional space that can flex however you need - bedrooms, office, or just extra room to spread out. Front is a fully fenced in yard that’s big enough to enjoy without turning into a full-time project and out back, you’ve got a detached 2-car garage. Overall, it’s a straightforward, well-kept home with good bones and the kind of character you can’t recreate - whether you’re looking to live in it or add a solid property to your portfolio. Convenient and close to interstate and anywhere else you need to go. Schedule your personal showing and come walk it in person while you still can - the woodwork and feel of this home doesn’t fully translate on a screen!

Welcome to 3287 Broadhaven Avenue… this sprawling brick ranch is what you have been searching for. Located on almost an acre in Jackson local school district it is sure to please. There is also a 16 X 12 and a 8 X 6 storage barn for outside storage and one for pool supplies. You don't want to miss this rare opportunity, call your favorite realtor today for a private showing!

There's something special about a one owner home. It overflows with memories from the last 50 years and the pride and care of being owned by the same family is evident. Fall in love with the setting of this home as the .59 acre wooded lot ensures privacy and a peaceful place to call home. Not to mention the deer, wildlife, and creek that is the backdrop of the home. Admire the curb appeal of this 4-level split offering just under 2,200 square feet of finished space plus additional living options in the basement level of the home. A double door entry opens to a large foyer with two closets for great storage. The formal living room at the front of the home has newer carpet and a large window. This room is connected to the formal dining room with great views of the wooded backyard. Enjoy granite tops and all appliances in the eat-in kitchen with adjacent dinette. Sliding doors provide convenient access to the 16x16 deck and gorgeous backyard. The lower level includes a large family room with fireplace, 4th bedroom perfect for guests or an office, plus a guest half bath, and laundry room. At the end of a busy day, head to the upper level where you will find 3 more bedrooms and two more full baths. The owner's space has a spacious walk-in closet and ensuite bath. The beauty of a 4-level split is that you have a basement level for storage. Or, use it as the current owners did if you need an in-law suite as it features a kitchenette space, full bath, and separate sitting area. The extra wide garage and driveway are perfect for guests, teens, and friends to park. Get your steps in and take a walk to the nearby library, park, and schools. It's time for new memories to be made!
